_note: Per-session position-size ceiling, keyed by mini family then session (RTH/ETH). Caps the DD-sizer's contract count for that session. NQ RTH -> 1 so an RTH stop (~$833 at the $900 stop-cap) fits inside the smaller RTH daily-loss budget (see daily_loss_caps.json). ETH is left uncapped (overnight is the profitable engine). Hot-reloaded ~5s. Remove a key to lift the cap. Applies to MNQ too (same family).
